text:
Beeskafmarro (ビースカフマロ, Bīsukafumaro), presumably a city, is the location where the 288th Hunter Exam took place. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 148 

Overview

It is presumably a small city located somewhere in the Kukan'yu Kingdom and it is the site location of the 288th Hunter Exam. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Killua follows the instructions of the Kiriko and then a man named Michael that leads him to the 288th Hunter Exam location in the backroom of the Diksakura store. Killua easily passes the First Phase of the exam and because of it, is exempt from taking the exam any further and becomes a Hunter. 

Locations

Diksakura

Translations around the World

References
